width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) so Scale.FIT FILLS a portrait phone and LETTERBOXES centered on a landscape laptop — one fixed canvas plays on both mobile and desktop. A fixed-axis shooter is a single-screen arena: the WORLD == this viewport (bounds.width/height match). OWNED BY core/gameConfig.json (the infra groups) — a module MUST mirror core's screenSize, never diverge (template-contract §4).

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width. OWNED BY core (template-contract §4).

maxHealth.description: Player cannon hit points (a gallery shooter is typically a few lives/hits)

moveSpeed.description: Cannon slide speed along its free axis (px/s) — tunes AxisConstrainedMovement

invulnerableTime.description: Invulnerability window after taking a hit (ms)

fireCooldownMs.description: Minimum ms between shots — tunes ProjectilePool.cooldownMs (the cannon's rate of fire)

timeLimit.description: Level countdown length in SECONDS for the failModel:'time' family (inert unless failModel === 'time'). Parity with core.

maxHealth.description: Default formation-member health (1 = one-shot, the classic)

points.description: Default points awarded per formation member killed

baseStepMs.description: Formation inter-step interval at FULL alive count (ms) — tunes FormationMarch; the rack accelerates below this as ranks thin

floorStepMs.description: The fastest the formation ever steps (the last enemy; ms) — tunes FormationMarch.floorMs
